claim: Dryer station 3 should run at 78°C for standard cotton cycles.
recommendation: Use 78°C according to the official SOP.
source_text: SOP: Dryer station 3 must be operated at 78°C for standard cotton cycles unless a supervisor approves a deviation.

claim: Welding station 3 should use the standard current setting during normal operation.
recommendation: Do not change the current setting unless approved by a supervisor.
source_text: SOP: Welding station 3 must use the standard current setting. Any current adjustment requires supervisor approval.

claim: Hotel A polyester items should be processed using the standard polyester cycle.
recommendation: Use the standard polyester cycle unless quality issues are observed.
source_text: SOP: Hotel A polyester items should follow the standard polyester cycle.

claim: Forklift batteries should be charged only in the designated charging area.
recommendation: Move the forklift to the designated charging area before charging.
source_text: SOP: Forklift batteries must only be charged in the designated charging area due to safety requirements.

claim: Packaging line 2 should be stopped when the sensor error light remains on for more than 30 seconds.
condition: sensor error light remains on for more than 30 seconds
recommendation: Stop packaging line 2 and notify maintenance.
source_text: SOP: If the sensor error light on packaging line 2 remains active for more than 30 seconds, stop the line and notify maintenance.
